titleStmt.title: SII 41.35: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 35. (A.R. No. 34 of 1905.) Tiṇḍivaṉam, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa of the Lakshminarasimha Perumāl Temple.

p.hi: Śaka 1439, Īśvara, Makara, Paurṇami, Punarpūsha, Monday, the Sankrānti day = 1518, January 25, Monday.

summary.p: Mentions a gift of land, measuring 300 kuḻi, in his sīrmai by Perugu Appalaiyaṉ of Śrīvatsa gōtra to the deity Lakshminarasimhamūrtti, for the provisions of curd rice, vegetable offerings, and sandal past praying for the merit of the nāyaka chief Tirumalai Nāyaka, who was the patron of the donor. Related to the next inscription (35 of 1905).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakāpputam 1000 4 100 3 10 6 mēlcellāniṉṟayīśvara varuṣam makaranāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu pūraṇai
yum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum punaṟpūca nakṣatramum peṟṟa saṅkrānti puṇya kālattiletiṇṭivanam lakṣmināraciṅkamūrttikku śrīvatsakotrattu peruku Appalaiyaṉ nāṉ pa
tavākkiya piramāṇikarāy tirumuranāyakar tirumalai nāyakkar Eṉakku muṉṉāḷ comakkireṇa puṇṇiya kālattile kiṭaṅkilēri kiḻakku ṉatta nilattil vatikku mēṟkkum
kuḻikku teṉkiḻakku piḷḷaiyārmāniyattukku vaṭakkum meṭṭukku teṟku Inta cīrmaikku viṭṭa kuḻi3 100 Ikkuḻi muṉṉūṟum lakṣmināraciṅkamūṟtikku mukkuṟuṇi Amutupaṭi tatti
yotaṉamum varuṣattukku Iraṇṭu paṇam cantaṇakkāppum kaṟiamutu Erikarumpukkumāka Oru paṇamum Āka tirumalaināyakkaṟku taṟmamāka Oru canti naṭattikkakaṭa
tāka saṅkirama puṇyakālattile lakṣmināraciṅkamūṟtikku Utakam paṇṇicilālihitam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ Eṉakku nittiyamum nānāḻi A
mutupaṭipiracātam tāṉattār putrapautra pāramparaiyāka naṭattakkaṭavarākavum niṉṟa Aṟunāḻi Aricipiṟacātamum tāṉattār
taṅkaḷ niṟuvākattile pakuntukoḷḷakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭikku Utakampaṇṇi taṟmacātaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttōm Inta taṟmattukku
yātoruvar Akitam niṉaittāl keṅkaikaraiyil kārām pacuvaikkoṉṟa pāvattilepokak kaṭavarākavum Oru tiruviḷakkum nittam Iṭakka
ṭavarākavum Ippaṭikku taṟmacātanam kuṭutteṉ nāraciṅkammuṟtikku Appalayaneṉ Perugu Appalaya vrāluIn Telugu scripttirumalai nāyakkar kaṭampuḻār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
